title: E-Commerce Order Management System 2026 Review: Order Processing Efficiency and Platform Collaboration Best Solutions
description: Deep review of Wangdiantong OMS, Guanyi Cloud Order, Jushuitan Order, Edianbao, Shop Manager and other mainstream e-commerce order management systems. Prof
content:
E-Commerce Order Management System 2026 Review: Order Processing Efficiency and Platform Collaboration Best Solutions

Order Management Core Value

Order management, as the core link of e-commerce operations, directly determines customer experience, shipment efficiency, operations costs, and inventory synchronization accuracy. In the 2026 e-commerce competitive environment, order management is no longer merely simple order recording, but evolved to cover platform order capture, intelligent review, automatic review split-merge, shipment integration, after-sales processing, and financial settlement complex business processes. With e-commerce enterprise operations platform quantity increasing (Taobao, JD, Pinduoduo, Douyin, Kuaishou, cross-border platforms, etc.), order volume fluctuates dramatically (order volume surges dozens of times during promotion), business scenarios become complex (presale, deposit, gifts, combination products, etc.), traditional manual order processing methods are unsustainable.

Industry data shows, enterprises efficiently using order management systems achieve average order processing efficiency improvement by 60%, shipment cycle shortened by 50%, order error rate reduced to 1%, customer service workload reduced by 40%. However, order management system value realization depends on system and business scenario match, about 35% enterprises face issues such as insufficient order system functions, stable platform integration, business scenario support and other issues. This article systematically reviews mainstream order management systems to help enterprises choose suitable solutions.

Mainstream E-Commerce Order Management System Deep Review

Wangdiantong OMS: E-Commerce Order Management Industry Benchmark

Wangdiantong OMS serves as Wangdiantong ERP's core module, known for strong order processing capability. System native support for Taobao, JD, Pinduoduo, Douyin, Kuaishou, Amazon and other 50+ mainstream e-commerce platform order automatic capture, order data real-time synchronization to system backend. Core functions include order capture, intelligent review, split-merge rules, shipment integration, after-sales management, financial settlement.

Wangdiantong OMS advantages: order processing depth and efficiency. Intelligent review module supports batch review, automatic review rules configuration, automatic filter risk orders, automatic validate inventory, automatic split-merge. Split-merge engine supports complex rules configuration, by product split, by warehouse split, by logistics split, by gift merge. Shipment integration supports mainstream logistics providers (SF, ZTO, YTO, Yunda) one-click integration, after order shipment automatic return platform, automatic synchronization inventory. After-sales management supports return-exchange processing, refund review, after-sales work order. Wangdiantong OMS provides order abnormal warning function, insufficient inventory warning, address abnormal warning, payment abnormal warning. Price included in Wangdiantong ERP package, suitable for all sizes e-commerce enterprises, platform operations needs.

Guanyi Cloud Order Center: Kingdee System Order Solution

Guanyi Cloud Order Center serves as Guanyi Cloud ERP's core module, inheriting Kingdee's deep accumulation in financial field, order data automatic flow to financial system, achieving business-financial integration. Core functions cover platform order capture, intelligent review, split-merge, shipment integration, after-sales processing, financial settlement.

Guanyi Cloud Order Center advantages: strong financial integration capability. After order shipment automatic generation receivables, automatic accounting costs, automatic generation profit reports. After order refund automatic generation refund record, automatic adjustment financial data. Order processing module supports batch review, automatic split-merge rules. Platform integration supports mainstream e-commerce platform order capture, stability is relatively high. Price included in Guanyi Cloud package, suitable for financial integration deep needs e-commerce enterprises, Kingdee financial system users. cost-effectiveness. System supports mainstream e-commerce platform order capture, batch review, automatic split-merge, shipment integration and other core functions complete. Interface design is simple and intuitive, quick to get started.

Jushuitan advantages: extremely simple experience and cost. Order processing process is clear, order list, review, shipment, after-sales and other stages are clear at a glance. Batch review supports one-click review all orders, significantly improving efficiency. Split-merge rules support common scenarios such as product split, warehouse split, etc. Shipment integration supports mainstream logistics providers, one-click print express, one-click shipment. Price included in Jushuitan package, annual fee only ¥1500-5000, suitable for startup e-commerce, small to medium online stores, cost-sensitive merchants.

Edianbao: E-Commerce Order Veteran Solution

As an e-commerce ERP field veteran product, order management module functions are mature and stable. Core functions cover platform order capture, order processing, shipment management, after-sales management, data analysis. Edianbao has deeply cultivated e-commerce scenarios for more than ten years, profound understanding of e-commerce business scenarios.

Edianbao advantages: strong stability and industry experience. System more than ten years iteration, functions mature, high stability. Platform integration covers mainstream e-commerce platforms, order capture stable and reliable. Order processing supports presale orders, deposit orders, gift orders and other complex scenarios. Data analysis module tracking order trends, shipment efficiency, after-sales rate and other key indicators. Price annual fee is about ¥3000-30000, suitable for large e-commerce enterprises, traditional e-commerce scenarios.

Shop Manager: Lightweight Order Processing Solution

Shop Manager is a lightweight order processing tool, focuses on order capture and shipment integration. Core focus helps e-commerce quickly process orders, improve shipment efficiency. Function modules include order capture, batch review, shipment integration, express printing.

Shop Manager advantages: lightweight and quick to get started. Shipment integration supports mainstream logistics providers, express batch printing, one-click shipment. Shop Manager price is extremely low, monthly fee is about ¥100-300, suitable for small online stores, order volume is less merchants, quick to get started needs.

Order Processing Key Scenario Best Practices

E-commerce order processing core challenges include: severe fluctuations in order volume peak, difficulty in platform order collaboration, complex business scenario processing (presale, deposit, gifts), abnormal order processing timeliness, inventory synchronization accuracy. Best practices recommendation: configure automatic review rules, filter risk orders, validate inventory, automatic review normal orders; establish split-merge rules system, clear by product split, warehouse split, logistics split rules; set order abnormal warning, insufficient inventory, address abnormal, payment abnormal automatic warning; establish shipment efficiency monitoring, real-time tracking shipment status, warning shipment timeout; establish after-sales processing process, return-exchange review, refund processing, after-sales work order standardization.

Key Decision Factors

E-commerce enterprises choosing order management systems, focus on consideration factors: First, platform integration coverage and stability, support enterprises operations all platforms, order capture stable and reliable; Second, order processing efficiency, batch review, automatic review rules, one-click shipment and other efficiency tools complete; Third, split-merge rules flexibility, by product split, warehouse split, logistics split, gift merge and other rules support; Fourth, business scenario adaptation, presale, deposit, gifts, combination products and other complex support scenarios; Fifth, financial integration depth, order data automatic flow to financial system; Sixth, after-sales processing capability, return-exchange, refund review, after-sales work order complete.

Future Trends Outlook

2026 e-commerce order management development presents three trends: First, intelligent penetration, AI driving intelligent review, abnormal identification, shipment path optimization and other capabilities are popularized; Second, full-channel integration, online e-commerce, offline stores, social e-commerce orders unified management; Third, order processing and supply chain collaboration, order data driving procurement prediction, inventory allocation, shipment warehouse choice. Enterprises should proactively evaluate tools' technology iteration capabilities.
author: Retail E-Commerce Research Institute
